sections.paragraph:
Original: סף

Transliteration: saph

Phonetic: saf

BDB Definition:

  1. a spreading out, basin, goblet, bowl
    1. basin, goblet
  2. threshold, sill
    1. threshold, sill, door-keeper

Origin: from H5605, in its original sense of containing

TWOT entry: 1538a,1538b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
